name: MYRadiologyImplementationGuide
title: Malaysian National Radiology Interoperability And Conformance Guide
publisher: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia

contact.name: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia
Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia

description: Draft national FHIR R4 radiology implementation guide for Malaysia, aligned to the national MY Core baseline and published as the computable core of a wider one-repository radiology conformance specification.

resource.name: MY Radiology Accession Pattern CodeSystem
resource.description: Draft policy options for accession identifier patterns. These codes describe candidate strategies rather than final national production policy.

resource.name: MY Radiology Accession Pattern ValueSet
resource.description: Candidate accession identifier patterns documented for sandbox and governance purposes.

resource.name: MY Radiology Appointment
resource.description: Optional scheduling profile for booked radiology slots where FHIR Appointment is used to expose scheduling state.

resource.name: MY Radiology DiagnosticReport
resource.description: Radiology report profile covering preliminary, final, and amended reporting, with linkage to imaging studies and optional structured findings.

resource.name: MY Radiology Document Type ValueSet
resource.description: Document types for packaged radiology report documents.

resource.name: MY Radiology DocumentReference
resource.description: Optional document-centric profile for packaged radiology report documents and cross-enterprise sharing scenarios.

resource.name: MY Radiology Finding Code ValueSet
resource.description: Placeholder binding envelope for structured radiology findings or measurements using SNOMED CT or LOINC.

resource.name: MY Radiology HIS Order Placer CapabilityStatement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for a HIS or CPOE system that places radiology orders and consumes workflow acknowledgements.

resource.name: MY Radiology ImagingStudy
resource.description: FHIR-facing imaging study metadata aligned to the DICOM study, including linkage to the order, performed procedure, and study identifiers.

resource.name: MY Radiology Modality ValueSet
resource.description: Example modality codes aligned to DICOM terminology.

resource.name: MY Radiology Observation
resource.description: Structured radiology finding or quantitative measurement profile to be used only when narrative reporting alone is insufficient.

resource.name: MY Radiology PACS Metadata Publisher CapabilityStatement
resource.description: Server capability expectations for a PACS or VNA exposing FHIR-facing imaging metadata for consumers.

resource.name: MY Radiology Procedure
resource.description: Performed imaging procedure profile linking the originating order to the performed act, performer context, and downstream report or study.

resource.name: MY Radiology Procedure Code ValueSet
resource.description: Preferred imaging procedure catalogue binding using a provisional locally hosted RadLex mirror strategy.

resource.name: MY Radiology Report Code ValueSet
resource.description: Representative LOINC document and report codes suitable for radiology report exchange.

resource.name: MY Radiology RIS Workflow Manager CapabilityStatement
resource.description: Server capability expectations for a RIS acting as the operational workflow manager and order filler.

resource.name: MY Radiology ServiceRequest
resource.description: Radiology imaging order profile for Malaysian deployments. It captures requested procedure, priority, indication, requester context, patient linkage, and provisional accession handling.

resource.name: MY Radiology Task
resource.description: Workflow tracking profile used to communicate radiology order receipt, acceptance, scheduling, in-progress, completion, rejection, cancellation, and amendment states.

resource.name: MY Radiology Validation Consumer CapabilityStatement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for a national validation or conformance consumer that reads and tests core radiology resources.

resource.name: MY Radiology Viewer Consumer CapabilityStatement
resource.description: Client capability expectations for a clinical viewer or EHR that consumes reports and imaging study metadata.

resource.name: MY Radiology Workflow State CodeSystem
resource.description: Technical workflow state codes for radiology Task.businessStatus in sandbox and conformance testing scenarios.

resource.name: MY Radiology Workflow State ValueSet
resource.description: Workflow state values for radiology task synchronisation.

resource.name: MY RadLex Procedure Mirror Placeholder
resource.description: PROVISIONAL canonical placeholder for a locally hosted mirror of the RadLex imaging procedure catalogue.

resource.name: MYAccessionIdentifierNamingSystem
resource.description: PROVISIONAL placeholder naming system for accession identifiers, using the recommended draft facility-date-sequence approach for sandbox use.

resource.name: MYEncounterExample
resource.description: Example ambulatory encounter linked to the radiology order and report workflow.

resource.name: MYFacilityIdentifierNamingSystem
resource.description: PROVISIONAL placeholder naming system for facility identifiers.

resource.name: MYHealthcareWorkerIdentifierNamingSystem
resource.description: PROVISIONAL placeholder naming system for healthcare worker identifiers.

resource.name: MYLocationExample
resource.description: Example CT suite location managed by the imaging facility.

resource.name: MYOrganisationExample
resource.description: Example imaging facility organisation used by the workflow examples.

resource.name: MYPatientExample
resource.description: Example patient record linked to the radiology order and reporting flow.

resource.name: MYPatientIdentifierNamingSystem
resource.description: PROVISIONAL placeholder naming system for the national patient identifier domain.

resource.name: MYPractitionerExample
resource.description: Example radiologist practitioner used across the reporting workflow.

resource.name: MYPractitionerRoleExample
resource.description: Example consultant radiologist role at the imaging facility.

resource.name: MYRadiologyAppointmentExample
resource.description: CT head without contrast

resource.name: MYRadiologyDiagnosticReportExample
resource.description: Example final radiology report linked to the imaging study and structured finding.

resource.name: MYRadiologyDocumentReferenceExample
resource.description: Packaged final radiology report document.

resource.name: MYRadiologyImagingStudyExample
resource.description: CT head without contrast

resource.name: MYRadiologyObservationExample
resource.description: Example structured finding observation linked to the radiology report.

resource.name: MYRadiologyOrderIdentifierNamingSystem
resource.description: PROVISIONAL placeholder naming system for radiology order identifiers issued by sandbox order placer systems.

resource.name: MYRadiologyOrderWorkflowBundleExample
resource.description: Example collection bundle showing the core order-to-report radiology workflow resources together.

resource.name: MYRadiologyProcedureExample
resource.description: Example performed imaging procedure derived from the originating radiology order.

resource.name: MYRadiologyServiceRequestExample
resource.description: Example radiology order carrying both placer order and provisional accession identifiers.

resource.name: MYRadiologyTaskExample
resource.description: Example workflow tracking task representing a scheduled radiology order.
